title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Punjab National Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Punjab National Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Punjab National Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Punjab National Bank:
Punjab National Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Punjab National Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
